text: What action should be taken immediately after a fire has been extinguished?

options.text: A) They are liable to spontaneous combustion
B) They are not a hazard
C) They are not a hazard unless ignited
D) They generate their own oxygen when ignited and difficult to extinguish

explanation: Certain materials involved in fires (like some chemicals or specific fuels) can be self-oxidizing. These require specialized extinguishing methods because they do not rely on atmospheric oxygen and are notoriously difficult to suppress once ignited.
